patches_planned.description: Add diagnostic warning log when candles[] array contains more than one element, to surface unexpected multi-candle batch payloads for investigation.
Apply eslint --fix (Prettier) to the files with confirmed formatting drift to restore lint clean status for the patched files.

no_patch_required: Payload validation — confirmed correct including all guard functions
Freshness calculation — confirmed correct (broker timestamp, not fetch time)
FreshnessBadge / VerdictBadge — confirmed correct (read from backend, no local derivation)
